security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: https://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://*.openai.com https://*.anthropic.com https://*.openrouter.ai wss://*.wisprflow.ai https://api.anthropic.com

bundle.shortDescription: Voice-first cross-platform IDE. BYO API key.
bundle.longDescription: Lipi is a voice-first, cross-platform IDE. Bring your own OpenAI, Anthropic, or OpenRouter API key. No backend. Works on Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android from a single codebase.
